sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_space (id Int32, spaces String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_space (id, spaces) VALUES (1, space(5));
UPDATE test_space SET spaces = concat(spaces, space(2)) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, concat('Spaces: ', spaces) FROM test_space;
SELECT id FROM test_space WHERE length(spaces) > 0;
